description: Style Note Now give your casual wear a twist of style with this pair of sandals from red chief. Wear them with your off-duty ensembles. Product Details Khaki sandals with thick forefoot strap which extends up to the mid foot with velcro closures on the side, cut out detail on the side, overlay and branding on top Soft and foamy foot bed Upper stitched to the outsole TPU outsole with lugs and grooves for firm grip Material and Care Leather Wipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust Use a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
